title: lichen_l2_send missing pkt NULL check
description:
Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_l2.c:266-354

lichen_l2_send() is called by Zephyr network stack with pkt parameter. The function does not check if pkt is NULL before calling net_pkt_get_len(pkt).

What goes wrong: If Zephyr calls L2 send with NULL pkt (possible in error paths or during interface shutdown), dereferencing pkt would crash. While Zephyr should never do this, defensive NULL check is cheap.

Note: Other L2 implementations in Zephyr also assume pkt is non-NULL since the stack guarantees it, but given this is security-critical code, defense-in-depth applies.
close_reason: Fixed: Added NULL check for pkt parameter at top of lichen_l2_send()
